name: carbon-context-mcp
description: Unofficial local MCP server for the IBM Carbon Design System (not affiliated with IBM). Offline docs/token/component lookup over a bundled reference pack. No network or token required.

scripts.build:data: npm run build:tokens && npm run build:scraped && npm run build:storybook
scripts.build:embeddings: npm run build:data && npm run build && node scripts/build-embeddings.mjs
